policy: Public benchmark data only. No synthetic underwriting submissions are generated.

bbq.name: BBQ
bbq.license: MIT per Hugging Face dataset metadata

outputs.bias_bbq.jsonl: 50 BBQ rows across age, gender identity, nationality, and SES
outputs.bias_demographic_perm.jsonl: empty by design; public real underwriting counterfactual profiles are not available
outputs.safety_benign.jsonl: 50 JailbreakBench benign behavior rows for over-refusal
outputs.safety_indirect_inject.jsonl: all available AgentDojo default-suite injection task goals, capped at 50
